title: Pentaraphia ventricosa
taxonomy: Pentaraphia ventricosa is a species of plant in the family Lycopodiaceae, which is a group of club mosses. The Lycopodiaceae family is a part of the larger division Lycopodiophyta, which includes all the club mosses. This division is a subgroup of the vascular plants, which are characterized by the presence of a vascular tissue system. The Lycopodiophyta division is a part of the larger group of plants known as non-flowering vascular plants. The classification of Pentaraphia ventricosa reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary history.
